hero.title: Imishinga yo kugera kuri rubanda
hero.lead: Uru rutonde rwerekana imishinga rusange ikorwa binyuze muri IATF. Imishinga yemewe yo kugerwaho, ibikorwa remezo byurubuga, na prototypes zibitswe zikomeza kugaragara hano.

intro: Imishinga yemewe yashyizwe ku rutonde hano nyuma yo gusohoka.

header.title: Guhindura icyifuzo gifatika cy'ubushobozi bwo kugera ku bantu mu mushinga rusange

paragraphs: IATF isuzuma ibyifuzo bifatika byo kuboneka bishobora guhindurwa mubikorwa byingirakamaro byububiko rusange.

emptyState.title: Kugeza ubu nta mishinga yashyizwe ahagaragara
paragraphs: IATF irimo gutegura igishushanyo mbonera cyayo cya mbere.
Urashobora kohereza icyifuzo niba ufite ibikenewe byihariye byo kugera.
